description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine with a black body and vibrant side panel artwork featuring stylized spaceships and Japanese text in bold orange. The front panel houses a large display screen with a visible game interface, surrounded by a control panel equipped with multiple buttons and joysticks, suggesting support for at least two players. The control panel is black with white and red buttons, and the layout is symmetrical. The top marquee displays Japanese characters in orange on a black background, matching the side panel text. Below the control panel, there is a coin slot mechanism with two slots and return buttons. The cabinet's overall design is retro, with a slightly curved top and a sturdy, rectangular base.
description: A retro upright arcade game cabinet with black body, vibrant spaceship artwork, Japanese text, and a control panel with multiple buttons and joysticks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with buttons and joysticks, coin slot, and marquee with Japanese text.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the colorful spaceship artwork and Japanese text on a dark blue background.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the same spaceship artwork and Japanese text as the left side, with visible control panel edge.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of joysticks and multiple buttons arranged side-by-side for two players, with a black background and white/red button color scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; black background with bold orange Japanese text, matching the side panel theme, no additional imagery
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, colorful spaceship illustrations with a starry background and bold orange Japanese text, creating a vibrant sci-fi theme
